title: Vacancy for Teacher at BITS Pilani

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at BITS Pilani
jsonLd.description:
BITS Pilani, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Srinagar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BITS Pilani:
BITS Pilani is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BITS Pilani!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
